titleStmt.title: SII 16.288: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 288. (A.R. No. 89 of 1917.) KOṆḌEPĀḌU, GUNTUR TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a stone lying near the tank at the village.
This is dated Śaka 1498, Dhāta, Āśvīja śu. 15, Monday, lunar eclipse, corresponding to 1576 A.D., October 7, The week day was, however, Sunday.

It registers the grant of a piece of land in the village Koṇḍepāḍu in his nāyaṅkara territory of Koṇḍavīṭi-sīma to the god Gopīnātha of the village and another piece of land as Chalivēndra-mānya for constructing some wells, supplying water to the watershed (chalipandali) and raising 100 trees, to Tammaḷa Vīrayya by Vēmula Rāghavayya, of the fourth caste, son of Mādhavayya and grandson of Timmana.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakava
rṣaṁbbulu 1468 Agunaṭṭi dhāta saṁvvatsara Ā
śvija śu 15 sō sōmagrahaṇa puṇyakālamaṁddu
śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīra
pratāpa śrīraṁggarāyadēvamahārāyalu vidyānagara
maṁdu ratnasiṁhvāsanārūṁḍhuḍai pṛthvīsāmrājyaṁ
śēyucuṁḍḍaṁgānu caturthavamusōbdhuvuṁḍu Ayina
vēmula tiṁmmanaṁgāri pavutrulu Ayina mādhuvayyaṁ
gāri putrulu Ayina rāghavayyaṁgāru Akhilāṁ
ḍḍakōṭibrahmāṁḍanāyakulu Ayina koṁḍepāṭi śrīgō
pi nāyakulaku Anaṁttamulugānu sāṣṭāṁggadaṁḍḍaṁ
mulu samarppiṁcci yiccina bhūdāna dha(r)rmaśāsana
kramameṭlaṁnnanu mā nāyaṁkkarānku sāgivaccē koṁḍḍa
vīṭi śīmalōnu koṁḍḍepāṭanu pūri tū
rppuna yāmartti tervuveṁṭṭanu dakṣiṇānanu
yīṁtamukkula tirumalabhaṭlacēnisthaḷamu saṁ
ggayacēnisthaḷamunnu kēsaripāṭni reṁḍu kuccaślu
ku kṣētraṁ sarvamānyaṁgānu yistimi
Ācaṁdrārkasthāyigā yistimi

yī tathātithi puṇyakālamaṁ
ddu vēmula rāghavayyaṁgāru
koṁḍḍipāṭivaddha nūtulagaṭṭi ce
rutu caliṁdraku nīru vōsēyaṁddu
ku nūru vrikṣālu vēsēyaṁdduku
taṁmmaḷa vīrayyaku yiccina bhūdā
na dha(r)rmaśāsanakramameṭlannanu mā nāyaṁ
kkarānaku sāgivaccē koṁḍavīṭisīmalōnu
koṁḍipāṭinu kurunūtula teruvu paḍama
ṭanu kēśavabhaṭla rāghavaya cēnistaḷaṁ
dala polimēramāni kēsarapāṭni reṁ
ḍu ku 2 kucceḷlu kṣētraṁ celiviṁdramānyaṁ
gānu sahiraṇyōdakadānadhārāpūrvaka
ṁgānu Ācaṁdrārkasthāyigānu putrapau
trapāraṁparyaṁgānu sarvamānyaṁgānu
yistimi ganuka Anubhaviṁcci bratikē
di . svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ para
dattānupālanaṁ . paradattāpa
hārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt .
svadattaṁ paradattāṁ vvāyō harēti vasu
ṣaṣṭhirvaruṣa sahasrāṇi
viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatēkrimiḥ . yēkaiva bhagi
nī lōkē sarvēṣāmēva bhūbhujāṁ .
na bhōjyā na karagrāhyā vipradattā
vasuṁdharā . vēmula rāgha
vayya vrālu Another short inscription near this in late characters reads:—
śrī tiṁmāpuri śrī veṁkaṭādriki tsunūri Aga-
sāla liṁgābattuni komāruṁḍu gaṁgābattuḍu
nityamu padivēlu daṁḍālu sama¨rppaṇa .
Digital edition of SII 16.288 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
